item.description:
Main enterance door unsecured please fixed it.

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Pavement, 28th April
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 71. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Rubbish Dumped in Front of Electric Sub-Sttation, 28th April
item.description:
More rubbish has been left dumped in front of the electric sub-station. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bags of Rubbish and Mattress Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
Multiple bags of (possibly commercial) rubbish along with an unwanted mattress have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:
An amount of unwanted timber has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Furniture and Bedding Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:

item.title: Unwanted Toilet Dumped on Path, 28th April
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Road drain completely blocked, 28th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Westmoreland Road, Plaistow, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley

item.title: Road uneven, 28th April
item.description:
Road is uneven and causing damage to tyres.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groombridge Close, Blackfen, London Borough of Bexley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter across all of Palace Road, 28th April
item.description:
From the start of Palace Road to the end there is litter, mainly on the road by the pavement. Because cars are always parked here, I'd guess that's why the litter doesn't get picked up. As well as picking up the litter (thank you), it would be great to consider a bin on the corner of Palace Road where it meets Anerley Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-30, Palace Road, Crystal Palace, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked on pavement where sign says not to, 28th April
item.description:
Car is on the pavement where our shouldn't be

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Anerley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Belisha beacon out, 28th April
item.description:
No power to central reservation Belisha beacon
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Street, Lower Belvedere, Bexleyheath, London Borough of Bexley
